comparison_to_previous_all_layer_rowchun.note: New narrowed layer-scope path reduces native batch context/KV append calls from the older all-layer rowchunk count while preserving generated-token equality; no performance claim is made from profiler timings.

finding: Current no-flag c4 profiler refresh after layer-scope narrowing stayed generated-token green at [137]*4 with rowchunk layers 3,7,11,15, row-aware batch-GEMV O, grouped-compact MoE, accepted c-aware projection, and batched sampler argmax. The trace contains expected native batch full-attention context/KV append kernels for the narrowed rowchunk scope plus grouped-MoE, c-aware projection, segmented-state, and sampler kernels. This is runtime/profiler evidence only because selected-layer rowchunk still records native_caware_decode=false.

batch_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path on selected layers
decode_blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path on selected layers
